basic_details.job_title: Indian Army 68th SSCW (Technical) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 30 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Army has officially released the notification for the 68th Short Service Commission (Technical) Women Course (April 2027), offering unmarried female engineering graduates a golden opportunity to join the Indian Army as commissioned officers. Widows of defence personnel are also eligible under Technical and Non-Technical (Non-UPSC) categories.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 08-07-2026 (1500 hrs) Last Date for Apply Online: 06-08-2026 (1500 hrs) Cut-off % Publication for Shortlisting: First week of September 2026 Likely SSB Duration: October-December 2026 (5-day SSB)

vacancy_details.details: The Army is hiring candidates across multiple engineering disciplines. The available streams include: Civil / Architecture - 07 posts Computer Science / IT - 04 posts Electrical - 03 posts Electronics - 06 posts Mechanical / Production / Aeronautical - 09 posts Widows of Defence Personnel (Tech & Non-Tech) - 02 posts (separate category) These roles offer women engineering graduates a direct entry into the Indian Army as commissioned officers.

selection_process: Application Shortlisting SSB Interview (5 days) Medical Examination Merit List Joining Letter
how_to_apply: Fill the online registration form and complete Aadhaar/matriculation verification
Click "Apply Online" → select "Short Service Commission Technical Course"
Fill Personal, Communication, Education, and previous SSB details
Review the "Summary of your information" page carefully
Click "Submit" and take two printouts of the application with roll number

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 08-07-2026 (1500 hrs) Last Date for Apply Online: 06-08-2026 (1500 hrs) Cut-off % Publication for Shortlisting: First week of September 2026 Likely SSB Duration: October-December 2026 (5-day SSB)

content_sections.heading: Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: The Army is hiring candidates across multiple engineering disciplines. The available streams include: Civil / Architecture - 07 posts Computer Science / IT - 04 posts Electrical - 03 posts Electronics - 06 posts Mechanical / Production / Aeronautical - 09 posts Widows of Defence Personnel (Tech & Non-Tech) - 02 posts (separate category) These roles offer women engineering graduates a direct entry into the Indian Army as commissioned officers.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for Indian Army SSCW-68 Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Nationality: Citizen of India, subject of Nepal, or person of Indian origin as specified Eligibility: Unmarried female engineering graduates or final-year students (result by 01 Apr 2027) Widows of Defence Personnel: Graduation in any stream (Non-Tech) or B.E./B.Tech (Tech), age limit up to 35 years Physical Standards: 2.4 km run in 13 minutes, 15 push-ups, 2 pull-ups, 25 sit-ups, swimming basics required

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Shortlisting SSB Interview (5 days) Medical Examination Merit List Joining Letter

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Indian Army SSCW-68 Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website www.joinindianarmy.nic.in Click on "Officer Entry Appln/Login" → "Registration" Fill the online registration form and complete Aadhaar/matriculation verification Click "Apply Online" → select "Short Service Commission Technical Course" Fill Personal, Communication, Education, and previous SSB details Review the "Summary of your information" page carefully Click "Submit" and take two printouts of the application with roll number

content_sections.heading: Indian Army SSCW(T) - 68 Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive for the 68th Short Service Commission (Technical) Women Course, commencing in April 2027. It offers unmarried women engineering graduates an opportunity to join the Indian Army as commissioned officers. Widows of defence personnel are also eligible under specific Technical and Non-Technical categories.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Indian Army has announced 30 stream-wise vacancies for women engineering graduates under the SSCW (Tech)-68 course. The vacancies are distributed among Civil, Computer Science, Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, and other engineering disciplines. Separate vacancies are also reserved for widows of defence personnel.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E. or B.Tech degree in the relevant engineering discipline from a recognized university. Final-year engineering students who can submit proof of passing by 01 April 2027 are also eligible to apply. Widows applying under the Non-Technical category must hold a graduation degree in any discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants should be 20 to 27 years of age as on 01 April 2027 for the Technical entry. Widows of defence personnel applying under the Technical or Non-Technical categories can be up to 35 years of age. Candidates must satisfy the prescribed age criteria mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening, shortlisting based on academic performance, a 5-day SSB Interview, medical examination, preparation of the final merit list, and issue of the joining letter. There is no written examination for this recruitment. Final selection depends on merit and medical fitness.

faq.question: Q6. What are the physical fitness requirements for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should meet the prescribed physical standards, including completing a 2.4 km run in 13 minutes, 15 push-ups, 2 pull-ups, and 25 sit-ups. Basic swimming knowledge is also desirable. Maintaining physical fitness before the SSB and medical examination is highly recommended.

faq.question: Q7. What are the important dates for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process begins on 08 July 2026 (1500 hrs) and closes on 06 August 2026 (1500 hrs). The shortlist is expected in the first week of September 2026, while the SSB interviews are likely to be conducted between October and December 2026.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to register on the official Indian Army recruitment website and complete the online application form. Applicants must verify their Aadhaar and educational details, select the Short Service Commission (Technical) Women Entry, upload the required information, and submit the application before the deadline. It is advisable to keep printed copies of the submitted form.

faq.question: Q9. Can final-year engineering students apply for Indian Army SSCW (Tech)-68 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, final-year B.E./B.Tech students are eligible to apply provided they can produce proof of passing their engineering degree by 01 April 2027. Failure to submit the required educational qualification within the prescribed timeline may lead to cancellation of candidature.
